name: HiVi Acoustics Technology Co., Ltd
summary: HiVi Acoustics Technology Co., Ltd designs, manufactures, and sells electro-acoustic and audio-electrical products worldwide. It offers home theaters, smart speakers, pro-audio and car audio products, public audio systems, multimedia speakers, and speaker drivers, as well as DIY kits. The company was formerly known as Guangzhou du xi electric co., ltd. HiVi Acoustics Technology Co., Ltd was founded in 1991 and is based in Guangzhou, China.
